boxDescription:
The underhood electrical center is located on the driver’s side of the engine compartment near the battery.
Lift the cover for access to the fuse/relay block.
You can remove fuses with a fuse extractor. The fuse extractor is located in the underhood electrical center. To
remove fuses if you don’t have a fuse extractor, hold the end of the fuse between your thumb and index finger
and pull straight out.

boxDescription:
The fuse block access door is on the driver’s side edge of the instrument panel. Pull off the cover to access the fuse block.
You can remove fuses with a fuse extractor which is mounted to the fuse block access door. To remove fuses
if you don’t have a fuse extractor, hold the end of the fuse between your thumb and index finger and pull straight out.
You may have spare fuses located behind the fuse block access door. These can be used to replace a bad fuse.
However, make sure it is of the correct amperage.

boxDescription:
The auxiliary electric cooling fan fuse block is located in the engine compartment on the driver’s side of the vehicle next to the underhood fuse block.
Lift the cover for access to the fuse/relay block
boxName: Auxiliary Electric Cooling Fan Fuse Block
